
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=戊申|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=wùshēn|w=wu-shen|mi=u⁵⁵ ʂən|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=mɐu ʂɐn|mc=məu ʂin|oc-bs=mə ʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{拼音|wùshēn|qq=}}、{{注音|ㄨˋ ㄕㄣ|qq=}}、{{lang-ko|무신|qq=}}、{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|Mậu Thân|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|丁未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|qid=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)|1=Monkey (zodiac)}} represents yang metal; according to the principle of {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|qid=Q4697552|lt=phase generation|1=Aioi}} (earth producing metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Monkey (戊申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (무신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thân

==Years of Yang Earth Monkey==
A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Wushen'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
| 
* {{ill|AD 48|en|AD 48|qid=Q30957|lt=48 AD|1=AD 48}}
* {{ill|AD 108|en|AD 108|qid=Q24431|lt=108 AD|1=AD 108}}
* {{ill|168|en|168|qid=Q24916|lt=168 AD|1=168}}
* {{ill|228|en|228|qid=Q32995|lt=228 AD|1=228}}
* {{ill|288|en|288|qid=Q32499|lt=288 AD|1=288}}
* {{ill|348|en|348|qid=Q32633|lt=348 AD|1=348}}
* {{ill|408|en|408|qid=Q30141|lt=408 AD|1=408}}
* {{ill|468|en|468|qid=Q30823|lt=468 AD|1=468}}
* {{ill|528|en|528|qid=Q32908|lt=528 AD|1=528}}
* {{ill|588|en|588|qid=Q32160|lt=588 AD|1=588}}
* {{ill|648|en|648|qid=Q30618|lt=648 AD|1=648}}
* {{ill|708|en|708|qid=Q23511|lt=708 AD|1=708}}
* {{ill|768|en|768|qid=Q29961|lt=768 AD|1=768}}
* {{ill|828|en|828|qid=Q30375|lt=828 AD|1=828}}
* {{ill|AD 888|en|AD 888|qid=Q29956|lt=888 AD|1=AD 888}}
* {{ill|948|en|948|qid=Q24318|lt=948 AD|1=948}}
|-
| 
* {{ill|1008|en|1008|qid=Q19235|lt=1008 AD|1=1008}}
* {{ill|1068|en|1068|qid=Q19421|lt=1068 AD|1=1068}}
* {{ill|1128|en|1128|qid=Q23746|lt=1128 AD|1=1128}}
* {{ill|1188|en|1188|qid=Q19732|lt=1188 AD|1=1188}}
* {{ill|1248|en|1248|qid=Q5483|lt=1248 AD|1=1248}}
* {{ill|1308|en|1308|qid=Q5723|lt=1308 AD|1=1308}}
* {{ill|1368|en|1368|qid=Q6207|lt=1368 AD|1=1368}}
* {{ill|1428|en|1428|qid=Q6315|lt=1428 AD|1=1428}}
* {{ill|1488|en|1488|qid=Q4853|lt=1488 AD|1=1488}}
* {{ill|1548|en|1548|qid=Q6551|lt=1548 AD|1=1548}}
* {{ill|1608|en|1608|qid=Q6758|lt=1608 AD|1=1608}}
* {{ill|1668|en|1668|qid=Q7595|lt=1668 AD|1=1668}}
* {{ill|1728|en|1728|qid=Q6947|lt=1728 AD|1=1728}}
* {{ill|1788|en|1788|qid=Q7765|lt=1788 AD|1=1788}}
* {{ill|1848|en|1848|qid=Q7647|lt=1848 AD|1=1848}}
* {{ill|1908|en|1908|qid=Q2056|lt=1908 AD|1=1908}}
* {{ill|1968|en|1968|qid=Q2644|lt=1968 AD|1=1968}}
|-
| 
* {{ill|2028|en|2028|qid=Q12809|lt=2028 AD|1=2028}}
* {{ill|2088 AD|ja|2088年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2088 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2080年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2148 AD|ja|2148年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2148 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2208 AD|ja|2208年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2208 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2268 AD|ja|2268年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2268 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2328 AD|ja|2328年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2328 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2388 AD|ja|2388年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2388 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2448 AD|ja|2448年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2448 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2508 AD|ja|2508年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2508 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2568 AD|ja|2568年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2568 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2628 AD|ja|2628年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2628 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2688 AD|ja|2688年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2688 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2748 AD|ja|2748年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2748 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2808 AD|ja|2808年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2808 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2868 AD|ja|2868年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2868 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2928 AD|ja|2928年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2928 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2988 AD|ja|2988年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2988 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}
=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 41 (1908) – the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|戊申詔書|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Q17641335|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17641335}}.
* In 1968 – the Tet Offensive during the {{ill|Vietnam War|en|Vietnam War|qid=Q8740|lt=Vietnam War|1=Vietnam War}}. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sự kiện Tết Mậu Thân|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey==
In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, “month” may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|qid=Q1147421|lt=Risshū|1=Liqiu}} to the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|qid=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro|1=Bailu (solar term)}}].)

==Days of Yang Earth Monkey==
=== Date Selection ===
The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442153}}.

== Related Articles ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Earth Monkey|qq=ja|戊申|version=98657993|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q904781|af|Aardaap (astrologie)|cdo|Muô-sĭng|de|Erde-Affe|hak|Vú-sṳ̂n|ja|戊申|ko|무신 (간지)|vi|Mậu Thân|za|Fouhsaen|zh-min-nan|Bō͘-sin|zh-yue|戊申|zh|戊申|zh-min-nan|Pêng-chún|zh-yue|丙子|cdo|Bîng-cṳ̄de|nds|Feuer-Röttvi|de|Yang Earth Monkey|fr|Singe de terre|af|Vuurrat (astrologie)|de|Feuer-Ratteen|en|Fire Rat|fr|Rat de feushak|it|Bing-chṳ́id|ko|병자|vi|Bính Tý|za|Bingceij|zh|丙子|ar|Yang Earth Monkey}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
